name: LAPA (Latent Action Pretraining)
downloadable: derived-only (releases weights and code; no language corpus)
redistribution: n/a (no new annotation corpus; consumed task text keeps source licenses)
suitability: descriptive-only: releases a latent-action model and VLA weights, no downloadable language corpus
focus_en: Unsupervised vision-language-action pretraining that learns discrete latent actions between video frames from actionless and human video, then fine-tunes them to real robot actions.
focus_cn: 无监督的视觉-语言-动作预训练：从无动作标注的视频与人类视频中学习帧间的离散潜在动作，再微调映射为真实机器人动作。
datapath_en: LAPA trains an action-quantization model that infers discrete latent actions between consecutive frames of actionless video, including human manipulation video such as Something-Something V2. It then pretrains a latent vision-language-action model to predict those latent actions from an observation and a task description, and fine-tunes on a small set of real robot trajectories to map latent actions to executable ones. LAPA releases the latent-action model and a 7B VLA under MIT; the task descriptions it conditions on are consumed from existing datasets, so it publishes no new language corpus.
datapath_cn: LAPA 训练一个动作量化模型，从无动作标注视频（包括 Something-Something V2 等人类操作视频）的相邻帧间推断离散潜在动作。随后它预训练一个潜在的视觉-语言-动作模型，从观测与任务描述预测这些潜在动作，并在少量真实机器人轨迹上微调，将潜在动作映射为可执行动作。LAPA 以 MIT 许可发布潜在动作模型与一个 7B 的 VLA；其所依赖的任务描述取自已有数据集，因此不发布新的语言语料。
flow_en: quantize discrete latent actions between frames
pretrain latent VLA on observation + task instruction
flow_cn: 无动作标注与人类视频
量化帧间离散潜在动作
在观测 + 任务指令上预训练潜在 VLA
微调为真实机器人动作
no_corpus_en: LAPA is a representation- and policy-pretraining method, not an annotation source. The latent actions are learned without action labels, and the task instructions it uses as conditioning are reused from Open X-Embodiment, BridgeV2, and Something-Something V2 under their own licenses rather than authored anew. It releases code and weights under MIT, so this atlas documents LAPA descriptively rather than clustering downloaded strings.
no_corpus_cn: LAPA 是一种表征与策略预训练方法，而非标注来源。其潜在动作在没有动作标签的情况下学习，作为条件使用的任务指令取自 Open X-Embodiment、BridgeV2 与 Something-Something V2 并遵循各自许可，而非重新撰写。它以 MIT 许可发布代码与权重，因此本图谱以描述性方式记录 LAPA，而非对下载的字符串进行聚类。
example_caption_en: LAPA pretrains on actionless and human video; the project page shows latent-action rollouts and robot results.
example_caption_cn: LAPA 在无动作标注与人类视频上预训练；项目主页展示潜在动作执行与机器人结果。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2410.11758, OpenReview (ICLR 2025), github.com/LatentActionPretraining/LAPA (MIT), and huggingface.co/latent-action-pretraining. Task instructions are consumed from source datasets, not newly authored.
citation: Ye et al., Latent Action Pretraining from Videos, ICLR 2025 (arXiv:2410.11758).
